results.title: Why the youth jobs crisis is becoming global
results.description: Young people in much of the world face growing competition for entry-level jobs as graduate numbers rise, hiring slows and AI-driven disruption adds uncertainty to career prospects.

results.title: Why young people are struggling to find entry-level jobs
results.description: Young people in much of the world face growing competition for entry-level jobs as graduate numbers rise, hiring slows and AI-driven disruption adds uncertainty to career prospects.
